name: Sean White
about: Recent experience at Armani Exchange Outlet. Strong communicator who excels in fast-paced environments and enjoys creating positive customer experiences. Team-oriented with patience and focus on helping customers feel confident.
interviewTranscript: My most recent retail experience is working at Armani Exchange Outlet. In that role, I helped customers find clothing that fit their style, answered questions about products, kept the store organized, and made sure customers had a positive experience in the moment they walked in. Working in retail taught me how to communicate with different types of people, stay patient in busy situations, and focus on helping customers feel comfortable and confident with their purchases. I enjoy working in fast-paced environments and being part of a team that creates a good experience for customers.
